productDisplayName: Maxima Ssteele Men White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel square case Dial style: White dial with bronze and white hands Strap style: Stainless steel bracelet style strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 6 hour mark, bronze accents on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
